rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate identically at 2/10 and reach the same conclusion: strong IC/distributed-systems background but no executive leadership or team-scaling experience for the CTO role. The variant's wording differs (e.g. naming MCP tooling, fintech domain specifics) but these are reworded restatements of the same strengths and concerns, well within ordinary run-to-run variation. Nothing in the variant keys off the location change from various international cities to the United States.
